hero.name: Rocco Tortorella
hero.welcome_md: Husband to [Aly Constantine](/people/aly-constantine), co-host of the **Courtyard Constellations** gatherings at their Boulder home, videographer behind [roccomountain.com](https://roccomountain.com/) — and a loving, warm, naturally-flowing presence with a flair for unique expression. He keeps his own clothing collection and shares it freely with friends, and he is one of those cells around whom a gathering simply organizes itself — witnessed at **Rise & Vibes**, at **Unison**, and (held by lineage report) at **Burning Man**.

facts.label: Field
facts.value_md: Hosting · videography · wearable-art generosity · gathering-presence · transformational-music documentation

facts.label: Held with
facts.value_md: [Aly Constantine](/people/aly-constantine) (wife · co-host of Courtyard Constellations); close friendships across the Boulder transformational-music ecology with [Brigitte Mars](/people/brigitte-mars) (see also [Pagan Ritual](/people/pagan-ritual) ), **Tay Blevons** (see [PORTAL](/people/portal) ), **Andy Babb** and **Lara Elle** (both deeply connected to [Rhythm Sanctuary](/people/rhythm-sanctuary) ), [Robin Liepman (Bloomurian)](/people/bloomurian), and **Danny Balgooyen** (Boulder Ecstatic Dance)

facts.label: Recurring rooms
facts.value_md: **Courtyard Constellations** (the home gatherings he co-hosts with Aly) · **Rise & Vibes** festival · **Unison** festival · [Ocean Bloom](/people/ocean-bloom-2024) (videographer) · [Boulder Ecstatic Dance](https://ecstaticdance.org/dance/boulder-ecstatic-dance-bed/) · **Burning Man** (held in his lineage by report)

facts.label: In this body's awareness
facts.value_md: Witnessed directly at Rise & Vibes, at Unison, and across the months of February through December 2025, when [Urs](/people/urs) lived as a houseguest at Aly and Rocco's Boulder home and watched the Courtyard Constellations form around him. After the houseguest months, this body remained in the Boulder– Longmont area through Rocco's April 18, 2026 birthday and the departure for Bali two days later. Burning Man sits in Rocco's lineage by report; this body has not been there.

articles.body_md:
Loving, warm, naturally flowing — three words that carry most of what people who have spent time with Rocco recognize. He does not push toward the center of a gathering; the gathering simply organizes itself around him. The flair for unique expression is part of how this works: a piece of his own clothing, the camera in his hand, the angle he reads the light from, the unhurried way he is wherever he is — the room finds itself oriented toward that frequency without anyone having to name it.

This is a particular kind of leadership-without-leading: the campfire posture ( [tend your flame](/vision/lc-tend-your-flame) ) translated into festival-fields and home-courtyards. The people around him receive without being asked to receive.
articles.heading: How he is in a room

articles.body_md:
**Clothing as gift.** Rocco keeps his own clothing collection — pieces he has gathered, made, found, curated — and shares it freely with friends. The garments move outward into the constellation; they show up on other bodies at the festivals, at the courtyard, at the Sunday morning ballroom. The economy underneath is one of wearable-art generosity: what he holds is held to be shared, not held to be kept.

**Videography as documentation-as-gift.** Through [roccomountain.com](https://roccomountain.com/) he carries the camera into the rooms his life is already in — Ocean Bloom most visibly, but also the broader transformational-music gatherings — and what comes back is evidence that the night happened, that the field was real, that the artists were seen. The footage is its own kind of attestation.

**The household opened.** The Boulder home he keeps with Aly is the courtyard around which the Constellations gather. Opening a household is one of the quieter forms of contribution to a constellation; the cells who open theirs become the anchors others orbit through.
articles.heading: What he gives

articles.body_md: Rocco and [Aly](/people/aly-constantine) are partnered at the relational scale and at the gathering-organ scale at the same time. Aly's curatorial and connecting work — Conscious Roots Presents, Boulder Ecstatic Dance, the music threading into Rise & Vibes and Unison — meets Rocco's hosting-presence and lens-work at the household and at the festival. The Courtyard Constellations gatherings are the form in which the two scales become one: a home, a gathering, a documented night, a constellation that knows itself.
articles.heading: Held together with Aly

articles.body_md:
The closest of their shared friendships thread the transformational-music and conscious-community ecology of Boulder and the wider Colorado-festival arc:

- [Brigitte Mars](/people/brigitte-mars) — Boulder herbalist, Naropa professor, and the elder presence inside [Pagan Ritual](/people/pagan-ritual).
- **Tay Blevons** — woven through [PORTAL](/people/portal), the Late-Night Takeover at Meow Wolf during MAPS Psychedelic Science 2025.
- **Andy Babb** and **Lara Elle** — life-partnered musical duo (Andy Babb and the Big Beautiful Band) who met dancing at [Rhythm Sanctuary](/people/rhythm-sanctuary) in February 2014; both deeply connected to the Sanctuary lineage.
- [Robin Liepman (Bloomurian)](/people/bloomurian) — Boulder Ecstatic Dance co-founder, longtime Liquid Bloom collaborator, the cell who once shared a roof with Amani Friend in the Boulder mountains.
- **Danny Balgooyen** — Sunday-morning co-host at [Boulder Ecstatic Dance](https://ecstaticdance.org/dance/boulder-ecstatic-dance-bed/), co-tending the floor with Aly and Robin.

*The list is the held part of the constellation, not the whole of it; other friendships remain open and will be named as Rocco wishes.*
articles.heading: The Boulder constellation he and Aly are inside

articles.body_md:
**April 18, 2026 — Rocco's 36th.** The celebration the constellation made for him took the shape of a jungle-themed evening at the home: a banner with his name, a bonfire in the courtyard, drumming, dancing, the dog in the middle of it all, and a three-tier cake with 36 on top. The constellation that this page lists by name — [Aly](/people/aly-constantine), [Brigitte](/people/brigitte-mars), Tay, Andy, Lara, Robin, Danny, and the wider circle — became, for one evening, a single room around him, celebrating the unique and open-hearted soul they each know him to be.

For [this body](/people/urs), the timing was a gift. The birthday landed two days before the departure for Bali on **April 20, 2026** — the closing of the Boulder arc that had begun when Aly and Rocco opened their home in February 2025. The Boulder configuration this page describes — Conscious Roots, Boulder Ecstatic Dance, the courtyard, the festival friendships, the household — gathered itself into one evening of celebration around the cell whose presence had been its natural center all along. It was, for this body, the most divine goodbye to the Boulder chapter that could have been imagined.

That the constellation organized itself around Rocco that night, without needing to be asked, is the same thing the page names everywhere else — only at the highest stakes available to it. The room finds its center; the center is the one who has been holding it open all along.
articles.heading: The birthday gathering — closing the Boulder arc

articles.body_md:
**Rise & Vibes** and **Unison** are the two festival-rooms in which this body has directly witnessed Rocco at the center of a gathering — the same naturally-flowing presence the household carries, scaled to a festival field. Many of the artists landing on those stages travel through Aly's connecting work; many of the documented moments travel through Rocco's lens.

**Burning Man** sits in Rocco's lineage. It is part of his friendships and his gathering-life, and it shows up across the constellation that knows him. This body has not stood on the playa, so the thread is held by report, not by direct witness — named here so the lineage is honest about what it carries.
articles.heading: Rise & Vibes, Unison, Burning Man

metadata.title: Rocco Tortorella — Boulder · Courtyard Constellations · Rise & Vibes · Unison | Coherence Network
metadata.description: A welcome to Rocco Tortorella — Aly Constantine's husband, co-host of the Courtyard Constellations gatherings at their Boulder home, videographer of Ocean Bloom and the wider transformational-music ecology, wearer and freely-sharer of his own clothing collection, natural center of gatherings at Rise & Vibes, Unison, and Burning Man.

en.footer_md:
Public: [roccomountain.com](https://roccomountain.com/)

*This profile is a welcoming scaffold; Rocco is invited to replace any part of it with his own words at any time. The texture of the household months and the friendships is held privately and is not part of the substrate's public rendering.*

note_from_body.body_md: A welcoming scaffold. Rocco is held here through ten months of living under the same roof at the Boulder house, plus direct witness at the festival-rooms where he naturally becomes a center of gathering. From this body's witness: the most unique and open-hearted soul this cell has met — and an honor to have lived with. The Burning Man thread is named because it is part of his lineage and his friendships, not because this body has stood on the playa with him. Rocco is invited to replace any part of this page with his own words at any time.
